## Type of change
- [ ] Bug fix (error correction)
- [ ] Improvement (better explanation, deeper coverage)
- [ ] New content (new topic, new language, new example)

## Checklist
- [ ] Content follows the style conventions (explain why before how)
- [ ] Jargon and acronyms are defined on first use
- [ ] Code examples have been tested
- [ ] No real secrets, passwords, or credentials are committed
- [ ] Cross-links to other topics use relative paths
